chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Appeal No.S–71of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of M.A. No.1833/2021. 16.07.2021 Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan, Advocate for applicant Mst. Fouzia (legal heir of deceased Mst. Soomri). Ms. Sobia Bhatti, A.P.G for the State. == On disposal of instant appeal by this Court by way of compromise on 06.08.2018 amount of Rs.326,729/- was deposited with this Court as a‘Diyat’ money for the applicant to be encashed by her together with profit, on attaining the majority. The applicant on attaining the majority by way of listed application has sought for withdrawal of ‘Diyat’ money so deposited on her behalf with this Court together with profit, which is not opposed by learned A.P.G for the State. In view of above, the office is directed to release the ‘Diyat’ money so deposited for the applicant, together with profit, if any, in favour of the applicant in accordance with law, after proper verification and identification. Listed application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
